messages.content: The operator opened this chat to answer the pending operator question on issue #28. Read issue #28, find its most recent "Blocked — operator needed" comment (marked `<!-- agencyx:settle:blocked-… -->`), and extract its question(s) and any options. Then you MUST pose the question to the operator by calling the `ask_user` tool with a small set of clickable options — never ask in prose, and do not just summarize the situation and stop. Only after the operator answers via `ask_user`, post that answer back to issue #28 as a comment that preserves the settle marker, so the agency resumes. Do not modify anything else on the issue.
Done. Your decision to split the work into smaller sub-issues has been posted to #28 with the settle marker preserved. The agency will see it and resume with the narrowed scope.

activity.label: Thinking

Let me distill the decision you need to make into concrete options:
